app.welcome_msg:
## 🎉 Welcome to Fractal Chat!

Fractal Chat is a **multi-dimensional AI chat workspace**. Unlike normal chats, you can **select any content to create branching sub-dialogues**, freeing your thinking from linear conversations.

---

### 🚀 Quick Start (3 Steps)

**1. Configure a model**
Click `⚙️` next to the input → set a password → add your API Key
Supports OpenAI / DeepSeek / Anthropic Claude / Gemini and more

**2. Start chatting**
Type in the input below, `Enter` to send

**3. Branch from a selection (core feature)**
Select any text in an AI response → popup menu → choose: `Deep dive` / `Debug` / `Switch model`
Sub-dialogues open in the right panel without disturbing the main conversation. Click **Merge back** when done.

---

> 💡 **Tip**: All data auto-saves — refreshing the page won't lose anything. Use the sidebar to switch conversations. Press `Esc` to close popups.

Give it a try! 👇
